name: XL9535 I/O Expander
description: The XL9535 component allows you to use **XL9535** I/O expander in ESPHome. It uses [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x20`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this `xl9535` component.
